lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕਮਾਣਾ ਸੰਗਿ ਜੁਲਿਆ ਨਹ ਜਾਇ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਮਿਟਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak kamaanaa sang juliaa neh jaae kirat mittaaeaa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, only your actions shall go with you; the consequences of your actions cannot be erased. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਲੁ ਜੋਬਨੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਵੈਸੀ ਰਹਿਓ ਪੈਨਣੁ ਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: maal joban chhodd vaisee rahio painan khaaeaa |
lines.english: Abandoning your wealth and youth, you will have to leave, without any food or clothing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖਹੁ ਦੂਖ ਭਏ ਨਿਤ ਪਾਪ ਕਮਾਇਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: sookhahu dookh bhe nit paap kamaaein |
lines.english: so does the constant commission of sins turn pleasure into pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਾਥੋਹੁ ਮਿਰਗ ਜਿਵੈ ਪੇਖਿ ਰੈਣਿ ਚੰਦ੍ਰਾਇਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: faathohu mirag jivai pekh rain chandraaein |
lines.english: Like the deer, captured on a moon-lit night,

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪਾ ਕਮਾਣੇ ਛਡਹਿ ਨਾਹੀ ਲੈ ਚਲੇ ਘਤਿ ਗਲਾਵਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: paapaa kamaane chhaddeh naahee lai chale ghat galaaviaa |
lines.english: The sins you have committed shall not leave you; placing the noose around your neck, they shall lead you away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬਿ ਲੋਭਿ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ਮਾਤਾ ਗਰਬਿ ਭਇਆ ਸਮਾਇਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: lab lobh ahankaar maataa garab bheaa samaaein |
lines.english: You are intoxicated with greed, avarice and egotism; you are engrossed in self-conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿਚੰਦਉਰੀ ਦੇਖਿ ਮੂਠਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਸੇਜਾ ਰਾਵਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: harichandauree dekh mootthaa koorr sejaa raaviaa |
lines.english: Beholding an illusion, you are deceived, and on your bed, you enjoy a false lover.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਮ੍ਰਿਗ ਅਗਿਆਨਿ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਨਹ ਮਿਟੈ ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਇਣੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak mrig agiaan binase neh mittai aavan jaaein |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, like the deer, you are being destroyed by your ignorance; your comings and goings shall never end. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਸਤੀ ਗਰਤਿ ਪਇਆ ਕਿਉ ਤਰੀਐ ਤਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: hasatee garat peaa kiau tareeai taaree |
lines.english: The elephant has fallen into the pit - how can it escape?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਠੈ ਮਖੁ ਮੁਆ ਕਿਉ ਲਏ ਓਡਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: mitthai makh muaa kiau le oddaaree |
lines.english: The fly is caught in the sweet candy - how can it fly away?

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਰਣੁ ਦੁਹੇਲਾ ਭਇਆ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਖਸਮੁ ਚਿਤਿ ਨ ਆਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: taran duhelaa bheaa khin meh khasam chit na aaeo |
lines.english: It shall be so difficult to swim across, for one who does not remember the Lord and Master, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖਾ ਸਜਾਈ ਗਣਤ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੀਆ ਅਪਣਾ ਪਾਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: dookhaa sajaaee ganat naahee keea apanaa paaeo |
lines.english: His sufferings and punishments are beyond reckoning; he receives the consequences of his own actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਝਾ ਕਮਾਣਾ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੁ ਹੋਆ ਈਤ ਉਤਹਿ ਖੁਆਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: gujhaa kamaanaa pragatt hoaa eet uteh khuaaree |
lines.english: His secret deeds are exposed, and he is ruined here and hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਦਾਸ ਜੀਵੇ ਲਗਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੀ ਚਰਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: har ke daas jeeve lag prabh kee charanee |
lines.english: The Lord's slaves live by holding on to God's feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਬਾਝੁ ਮੂਠਾ ਮਨਮੁਖੋ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak satigur baajh mootthaa manamukho ahankaaree |3|
lines.english: O Nanak, without the True Guru, the self-willed egotistical manmukh is defrauded. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਲ ਬੁਧਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਅਪਣਾ ਆਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bal budh giaan dhiaan apanaa aap naam japaaeaa |
lines.english: He blesses them with power, wisdom, knowledge and meditation; He Himself inspires them to chant His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਠਿ ਲਗਾਇ ਲੀਏ ਤਿਸੁ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਸਰਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: kantth lagaae lee tis tthaakur saranee |
lines.english: The Lord and Master embraces those who seek His Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਆਪਿ ਹੋਆ ਆਪਿ ਜਗਤੁ ਤਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: saadhasangat aap hoaa aap jagat taraaeaa |
lines.english: He Himself is the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, and He Himself saves the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਿ ਲੀਏ ਰਖਣਹਾਰੈ ਸਦਾ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਕਰਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: raakh lee rakhanahaarai sadaa niramal karanee |
lines.english: The Preserver preserves those whose actions are always pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਰਕਿ ਨ ਜਾਹਿ ਕਬਹੂੰ ਹਰਿ ਸੰਤ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਸਰਣੀ ॥੪॥੨॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: naanak narak na jaeh kabahoon har sant har kee saranee |4|2|11|
lines.english: O Nanak, they never have to go to hell; the Lord's Saints are under the Lord's Protection. ||4||2||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੰਞੁ ਮੇਰੇ ਆਲਸਾ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਸਿ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: vany mere aalasaa har paas benantee |
lines.english: Be gone, O my laziness, that I may pray to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਵਉ ਸਹੁ ਆਪਨੜਾ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੋਹੰਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: raavau sahu aapanarraa prabh sang sohantee |
lines.english: I enjoy my Husband Lord, and look beautiful with my God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗੇ ਸੋਹੰਤੀ ਕੰਤ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰੈਣੀ ਰਾਵੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: sange sohantee kant suaamee dinas rainee raaveeai |
lines.english: I look beautiful in the Company of my Husband Lord; I enjoy my Lord Master day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਚਿਤਾਰਿ ਜੀਵਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪੇਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: saas saas chitaar jeevaa prabh pekh har gun gaaveeai |
lines.english: I live by remembering God with each and every breath, beholding the Lord, and singing His Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਹਾ ਲਜਾਇਆ ਦਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਮਿਉ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਿੰਚੰਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: birahaa lajaaeaa daras paaeaa amiau drisatt sinchantee |
lines.english: The pain of separation has grown shy, for I have obtained the Blessed Vision of His Darshan; His Ambrosial Glance of Grace has filled me with bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਮੇਰੀ ਇਛ ਪੁੰਨੀ ਮਿਲੇ ਜਿਸੁ ਖੋਜੰਤੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak meree ichh punee mile jis khojantee |1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, my desires are fulfilled; I have met the One I was seeking. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਸਿ ਵੰਞਹੁ ਕਿਲਵਿਖਹੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: nas vanyahu kilavikhahu karataa ghar aaeaa |
lines.english: Run away, O sins; the Creator has entered my home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਤਹ ਦਹਨੁ ਭਇਆ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dootah dehan bheaa govind pragattaaeaa |
lines.english: The demons within me have been burnt; the Lord of the Universe has revealed Himself to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਚਰਜੁ ਡੀਠਾ ਅਮਿਉ ਵੂਠਾ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦੀ ਜਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aacharaj ddeetthaa amiau vootthaa gur prasaadee jaaniaa |
lines.english: I have seen the Wondrous Lord; He showers His Ambrosial Nectar upon me, and by Guru's Grace, I know Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟੇ ਗੁਪਾਲ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਲਾਲਨ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਵਖਾਣਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: pragatte gupaal gobind laalan saadhasang vakhaaniaa |
lines.english: The Beloved Lord of the Universe, the Lord of the World has revealed Himself; in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I chant His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜਿ ਮੇਲਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਆਪਿ ਬਣਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak sukh sehaj melaa prabhoo aap banaaeaa |2|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, God brings us to union with Himself, in the poise of celestial peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਆਈ ਵਜੀ ਵਧਾਈ ਨਹ ਅੰਤੁ ਜਾਈ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: man saant aaee vajee vadhaaee neh ant jaaee paaeaa |
lines.english: My mind is at peace, resounding with the music of bliss; the Lord's limits cannot be found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਜੈ ਧਰਮੁ ਕਰੇ ਦੂਤ ਭਏ ਪਲਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: jai jai dharam kare doot bhe palaaein |
lines.english: The Righteous Judge of Dharma applauds them, and the Messenger of Death runs away from them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰਕ ਨ ਡੀਠੜਿਆ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਨਾਰਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: narak na ddeettharriaa simarat naaraaein |
lines.english: They do not have to see hell, if they remember the Lord in meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਮ ਧੀਰਜ ਸਹਜ ਸੁਖੀਏ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਜੇ ॥
lines.translit: dharam dheeraj sehaj sukhee saadhasangat har bhaje |
lines.english: Dharmic faith, patience, peace and poise are obtained by vibrating upon the Lord in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਅਨੁਗ੍ਰਹੁ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੀਨੇ ਮੋਹ ਮਮਤਾ ਸਭ ਤਜੇ ॥
lines.translit: kar anugrahu raakh leene moh mamataa sabh taje |
lines.english: Showering His Blessings, He saves those who renounce all attachments and egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਗਲ ਆਸ ਪੁਜਾਇਣ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak simar suaamee sagal aas pujaaein |3|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, remembering the Lord and Master in meditation, all hopes are fulfilled. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਹਿ ਕੰਠਿ ਲਾਏ ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਜਪਤ ਅਘਾਇਣ ॥
lines.translit: geh kantth laae gur milaae govind japat aghaaein |
lines.english: The Lord embraces us; the Guru unites us with Him. Meditating on the Lord of the Universe, we are satisfied.
